title: 重命名命令标题与聊天指令入口
summary: 在既有 Harness/harness 运行时重命名基础上，本轮补齐了 README 与 Agent Map 的命令入口标题对齐，并新增一条独立通过的回归测试来锁定 command id 映射与用户可见入口文案。
architectureNotes: Multiple modules changed; confirm each edit belongs to a single responsibility and document reuse opportunities.

tests.command: 2026-04-05: npm test -- --grep "user-visible Harness entry labels keep command ids stable and avoid legacy Ralph titles" -> passed.

riskReasons: The story risk was inferred from the available completion evidence.
releaseNotes: Completed scope: 重命名命令标题与聊天指令入口.
rollbackHints: Review and revert these paths together if rollback is needed: EADME.md, rc/agentMap.ts, rc/test/extension.test.ts.
Use the story-scoped commit as the primary rollback unit before considering any selective revert.
followUps: 单独修复项目约束标题语言不一致导致的全量测试失败。
如需继续推进品牌统一，单开故事清理 README 叙事文案、仓库 URL 与测试临时目录中的 Ralph 历史命名。
